lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint is flawless, and the interior shows no signs of wear. All mechanical and electronic systems are in perfect working order.
The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This car is ready for a full-scale restoration and represents a fantastic, budget-friendly opportunity for someone handy with a wrench. While it currently shows heavy wear and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it’s a great chance to bring a vehicle back to life exactly how you want it!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional and dependable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several minor scratches and a small dent on the rear quarter panel, while the interior shows visible wear on the driver's seat and carpet. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but it is approaching the interval for several routine maintenance items, including a brake service and new tires. While it lacks the polish of a newer model, it remains a solid choice for someone looking for basic transportation at a reasonable price point.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine struggles to start consistently and emits smoke when running, suggesting internal wear or a leak. The transmission shifts roughly, and the suspension is quite worn, leading to a bumpy ride. Externally, there are several large dents, significant paint peeling, and noticeable rust spots on the body panels. The interior shows heavy wear, with torn upholstery and several non-functional electronic components, including the radio and air conditioning. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition, it offers a refined driving experience and proven reliability. A comprehensive inspection ensures this automobile meets our rigorous standards for quality and performance.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a great car. It runs smoothly and has clearly been well-loved over the years. It’s in solid shape and ready for its next adventure with a new owner! If you're looking for a reliable set of wheels that still has plenty of life left in it, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minimal interior wear.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive condition, perfect for someone seeking reliability and style. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish that catches the light beautifully, with only minor cosmetic imperfections expected from careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the upholstery is supple and free of significant wear, while all dashboard controls and infotainment features operate exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a documented history of routine oil changes and preventative maintenance. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the braking system provides firm, confident stops. Whether you’re commuting or taking a weekend getaway, this car offers a comfortable, quiet, and dependable driving experience. It’s a complete package that balances performance with everyday practicality.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and value. Meticulously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic distinction, this unit stands as a testament to conscientious ownership. It offers a refined driving experience and remains a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking reliability without compromise.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-appointed interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking dependable performance and lasting value.

Hi there! I'm selling my trusty car and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super dependable for all my trips. It runs beautifully and is just waiting for someone new

Offering a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS system. This chassis remains structurally sound with documented rear subframe reinforcement and recent rod bearing prophylaxis to ensure long-term mechanical integrity. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential, providing exceptional corner-exit traction. The suspension has been refreshed with polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the communicative analog feedback this platform is celebrated for. While the exterior shows minor patina consistent with its age, the drivetrain remains tight, the throttle response is instantaneous, and the 8,000 RPM redline is as intoxicating as ever. A mechanically sorted example ready for the twisties.
Used car. Good condition. Reliable performance. Clean interior. Minimal wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor road-wear expected of a carefully driven car. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium seating surfaces are supple and free of major blemishes, and all electronic features—from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, backed by a complete service history that proves its mechanical integrity. With recent tire replacements and a fresh professional detail, this car offers a premium driving experience. It is turn-key ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by both performance and reliability. The interior and exterior maintain a high standard of aesthetic preservation, reflecting a history of attentive ownership. We invite you to experience the superior engineering and enduring value of this exceptional selection.

This impeccably maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the refined motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a rigorous professional assessment to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a superior balance of value and prestige, this vehicle stands as a testament to disciplined ownership and enduring quality.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty car, and it’s been such a reliable ride for me. It’s in really solid condition and has been well-cared for, making it the perfect daily driver for someone who wants comfort and quality without the brand-new price tag. It runs beautifully and still looks great parked in the driveway—come take it for a test drive and see for yourself! You're going to love it.

Used vehicle. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, having been meticulously maintained by a non-smoking owner. The exterior retains a beautiful shine, showing only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use, while the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the upholstery is plush and intact, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system—operates exactly as it should. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission, a responsive engine with a documented service history, and tires with deep tread remaining. It drives straight and true, offering a quiet, comfortable ride that reflects its history of consistent upkeep. This is a solid, well-presented example ready for its next long-term owner.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies both consistent performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a documented service history and a well-preserved aesthetic, this motorcar offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a distinguished vehicle that balances mechanical integrity with exceptional market value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate acquisition, this selection balances performance with enduring value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been an absolute joy to drive. It's in really solid shape—super reliable and perfect for your daily commute or a weekend getaway! I've taken great care of it, and it's ready to hit the road with a new owner today. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains composed with its original MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension architecture, providing tactile steering feedback and sharp turn-in. Recent maintenance includes a VANOS system refresh and a comprehensive subframe inspection. While showing minor cosmetic patina expected of its vintage, the mechanical synchronization and atmospheric induction remain top-tier for the purist driver.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title.

This exceptionally well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of reliability and style, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a beautiful shine, showing only the light, honest character marks one would expect from a car that has been driven with care and parked under cover. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and odor-free, with all comfort features and electronic systems—from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system—operating exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has benefited from a rigorous maintenance schedule, including a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection and fresh fluid service. The engine delivers smooth, consistent power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a confident and comfortable driving experience. This is a turnkey vehicle that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter on the road.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic appeal. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and reliability for its next owner. Vetted against our professional standards, it offers a superior driving experience that balances luxury with practical longevity. A distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking both value and proven quality.
